component.name: Webex Web
component.summary: Webex web client as a standalone desktop app

description.p: Webex Web wraps web.webex.com in a dedicated window with persistent login, a tray icon, desktop notifications, and working camera, microphone, and screen sharing via the system screencast portal.
Not affiliated with or endorsed by Cisco. Webex is a trademark of Cisco.
Rebuilt on Electron. Screen and window sharing now use the system screencast portal directly.
